concerns.text: SC-001 states 'negligible null percentage' without quantitative threshold. Specify explicit percentage (e.g., <1% or <0.1%) to enable pass/fail determination.
SC-013 uses 'null percentage remains negligible' and 'format pass rate meets acceptable standards' — both undefined. Replace with explicit thresholds (e.g., null <1%, format pass ≥95%).
FR-001 states 'null percentage within acceptable limits' without defining 'acceptable'. Specify threshold value for verifiability.
FR-002 states 'null percentage negligible' and 'format validation passes' without quantitative criteria. Define both thresholds explicitly.
